# Our Best Year Yet: New Awards Highlight Product, Company Culture

Seven years ago, Sift Science embarked on a journey to fight fraud with machine learning. Since then, we’ve made strides in our fraud-fighting journey that…

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift Trust and Safety Team

May 29, 2018

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Seven years ago, Sift Science embarked on a journey to fight fraud with machine learning. Since then, we’ve made strides in our fraud-fighting journey that have taken us down a path of new opportunities for growth and development – from our Series D funding to our recently formed Trust Advisory Board and beyond.

Now, we’re pleased to share two new awards that confirm that our culture and product continue to resonate with employees, customers, and our industry peers.

## Inc. Magazine’s Best Workplaces

Every year, Inc. Magazine recognizes private American companies who have created exceptional workplaces with vibrant cultures, deep employee engagement, and stellar benefits. Out of thousands of applicants, Inc. singled out Sift Science, along with about 50 other software companies.

![](https://dev-sift.pantheonsite.io/app/uploads/2018/05/CareerPage11-1024x684-1.jpg)

We agree with Inc. Magazine’s definition of a Best Workplace: it’s more than good pay and good perks – it’s also about having a clear purpose, a sense of humor, and leadership that makes a team enjoy working together. It’s important to us to collaborate and continuously foster an environment where Sifties (our internal term for employees) can speak up if they have an idea. We’re proud of the culture we’ve built, and we are honored to be recognized by one of the top business magazines for the work we’ve put into creating it.

What’s unique about the Inc. Magazine Best Workplaces award is that our very own Sifties are the ones who nominated us and gave us the praise to qualify for this recognition. To sum it up in the words of our CEO and co-founder, Jason Tan: life’s too short not to work with people you can learn from, solve tough problems with, and have fun with.

## CNP Award, Best Antifraud Solution

At the most recent CNP Expo, Sift Science was awarded Judges Choice for Best Antifraud Solution! This recognition is widely regarded as CNP Expo’s most competitive award category, and we are thrilled to take it home for a second straight year as a testament to our commitment to delivering the best product on the market, powered by the dedication of our talented team.

![](https://dev-sift.pantheonsite.io/app/uploads/2018/05/2cnp-1024x680-1.jpg)

Processed with VSCO with m3 preset

Along with our passionate team of Sifties, our customers are what drive us. Their ongoing support is what keeps us motivated and encourages us to push the boundaries of what it means to deliver a top antifraud solution. By collaborating with some of the world’s top brands, we’re able to learn and grow alongside our clients to continue on our collective path to success.

In concert with our Series D funding announcement, these honors are shaping 2018 as Sift’s greatest year yet. We owe it to our team of Sifties that keep the fire burning bright, and look forward to a future of continued success.
